blockers.expected_action: Promote Open Assembly from metadata-only to bounded sample-call verification after service IDs and legislative parameters are pinned.
Register an Open Assembly adapter with verification and call capabilities before runtime evidence can be generated.
Define a non-secret KEY injection path for source-scoped CI and local bounded checks.

next_evidence_plan.first_batch_policy: Run a credential-gated bounded sample-call batch only after service IDs and required legislative parameters are pinned.
next_evidence_plan.promotion_gate: Do not promote Open Assembly datasets beyond registry_only until runtime evidence and legislative identity mappings exist.

warnings.actual: 0 runtime checks are collected for Open Assembly.
warnings.remaining: Use reports/open-assembly/runtime-candidates.json with a registered adapter and credentials to run the first bounded verification batch.
